segments.text: And when the day of Pentecost was fully come, they were all with one accord in one place.
And suddenly there came a sound from heaven as of a rushing mighty wind, and it filled all the house where they were sitting.
And there appeared unto them cloven tongues like as of fire, and it sat upon each of them.
And they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and began to speak with other tongues, as the Spirit gave them utterance.
And there were dwelling at Jerusalem Jews, devout men, out of every nation under heaven.
Now when this was noised abroad, the multitude came together, and were confounded, because that every man heard them speak in his own language.
And they were all amazed and marvelled,
Behold, are not all these which speak Galilæans?
segments.speaker: Crowd

segments.text: And how hear we every man in our own tongue, wherein we were born?
segments.speaker: Crowd

segments.text: Parthians, and Medes, and Elamites, and the dwellers in Mesopotamia, and in Judæa, and Cappadocia, in Pontus, and Asia,
Phrygia, and Pamphylia, in Egypt, and in the parts of Libya about Cyrene, and strangers of Rome, Jews and proselytes,
Cretes and Arabians, we do hear them speak in our tongues the wonderful works of God.
segments.speaker: Crowd

segments.text: And they were all amazed, and were in doubt,
What meaneth this?
segments.speaker: Crowd

segments.text: These men are full of new wine.
segments.speaker: Some Mockers

segments.text: But Peter, standing up with the eleven, lifted up his voice, and said unto them,
Ye men of Judæa, and all ye that dwell at Jerusalem, be this known unto you, and hearken to my words:
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: For these are not drunken, as ye suppose, seeing it is but the third hour of the day.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: But this is that which was spoken by the prophet Joel;

And it shall come to pass in the last days, I will pour out of my Spirit upon all flesh: and your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, and your young men shall see visions, and your old men shall dream dreams:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And on my servants and on my handmaidens I will pour out in those days of my Spirit; and they shall prophesy:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will shew wonders in heaven above, and signs in the earth beneath; blood, and fire, and vapour of smoke:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The sun shall be turned into darkness, and the moon into blood, before that great and notable day of the Lord come:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And it shall come to pass, that whosoever shall call on the name of the Lord shall be saved.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Therefore let all the house of Israel know assuredly, that God hath made that same Jesus, whom ye have crucified, both Lord and Christ.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Now when they heard this, they were pricked in their heart,
Men and brethren, what shall we do?
segments.speaker: Crowd

segments.text: Repent, and be baptized every one of you in the name of Jesus Christ for the remission of sins, and ye shall receive the gift of the Holy Ghost.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Then they that gladly received his word were baptized: and the same day there were added unto them about three thousand souls.
